title: Name suggestions for unnamed angels
wikitext:
[]: Name suggestions for unnamed angels Post by Asugran233 » Thu May 27, 2021 8:53 am Do you know what would happen if in Rebuilds the creators called Angels? As they rose not to name them, and in 2.0 there were two new angels, I rose to put my suggestions of names for these angels here, maybe I will like them. The Third Angel-Gabriel The Seventh Angel-??? And you share your suggestions.

[]: Re: Name suggestions for unnamed angels Post by Blockio » Thu May 27, 2021 6:28 pm All the angels in Rebuild are unnamed; however the colloquial name for 3rd and 7th are "Tunniel" and "Clockiel" respectively. The 12th doesn't really have a generally accepted name, but "Wombiel" is probably the closest to it

[]: Re: Name suggestions for unnamed angels Post by bobgoesw00t » Fri May 28, 2021 7:01 pm Blockio wrote: All the angels in Rebuild are unnamed; however the colloquial name for 3rd and 7th are "Tunniel" and "Clockiel" respectively. The 12th doesn't really have a generally accepted name, but "Wombiel" is probably the closest to it

[]: Re: Name suggestions for unnamed angels Post by Blockio » Fri May 28, 2021 7:11 pm If we're talking about "serious" name suggestions, I'd go with Lucifer for the third, what with all the snake imagery, but beyond that I don't really have any strong feelings, I call them by their numbers anyway

[]: Re: Name suggestions for unnamed angels Post by ProcopiousJones » Sun May 30, 2021 1:20 am Odds are, we might never know the names for the NTE counterparts of the NGE angels; we might have to settle for calling them by their number. However, we still have one more movie to go, and it could give insight as to what their names are; knowing their true names before seeing 3.0+1.0 could be major spoilers for it, as well as NTE as a whole. As for angel names, I would have Samael (Venom/Poison of God) as a name for an angel; However, in EoE after Unit-01 leaves GNR and ascends to the heavens, she grows six pairs of AT-Field wings, visually and thematically mimicking that of Samael.

[]: Re: Name suggestions for unnamed angels Post by UrsusArctos » Sun May 30, 2021 9:11 pm ProcopiousJones wrote: As for angel names, I would have Samael (Venom/Poison of God) as a name for an angel; However, in EoE after Unit-01 leaves GNR and ascends to the heavens, she grows six pairs of AT-Field wings, visually and thematically mimicking that of Samael.

[]: Re: Name suggestions for unnamed angels Post by Asugran233 » Tue Jun 01, 2021 2:24 pm bobgoesw00t wrote: Blockio#923680 wrote: All the angels in Rebuild are unnamed; however the colloquial name for 3rd and 7th are "Tunniel" and "Clockiel" respectively. The 12th doesn't really have a generally accepted name, but "Wombiel" is probably the closest to it

[]: Re: Name suggestions for unnamed angels Post by Archer » Wed Jun 02, 2021 7:04 am IMO, they don’t really need names. In-universe, I’m pretty sure the names (hell, even the “Angel” moniker) are just arbitrary code-names given by Seele which may or may not have some passing biblical references because they’re a bunch of nerds. Given that Seele in the Rebuilds are a bunch of actual ancient aliens instead of some Bible nerds in a Zoom call, they likely just didn’t feel the need to apply human religious metaphors to them.

[]: Re: Name suggestions for unnamed angels Post by bobgoesw00t » Thu Jun 03, 2021 11:14 pm Archer wrote: IGiven that Seele in the Rebuilds are a bunch of actual ancient aliens instead of some Bible nerds in a Zoom call, they likely just didn’t feel the need to apply human religious metaphors to them.

[]: Re: Name suggestions for unnamed angels Post by The Dragon Mask » Mon Jul 26, 2021 9:49 pm Archer wrote: ...

[]: Re: Name suggestions for unnamed angels Post by GhostlyOcam » Mon Jul 26, 2021 10:51 pm ^^^ I mean, this was shown and heavily implied -if not confirmed- in Gendo's 3.0 dialogue, so it doesn't fall into 3.0+1.0's spoiler territory.

[]: Re: Name suggestions for unnamed angels Post by The Dragon Mask » Tue Jul 27, 2021 12:43 am GhostlyOcam wrote: ^^^ I mean, this was shown and heavily implied -if not confirmed- in Gendo's 3.0 dialogue, so it doesn't fall into 3.0+1.0's spoiler territory.

[]: Re: Name suggestions for unnamed angels Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Jul 27, 2021 1:20 am Like GhostlyOcam said, it's from 3.0, and you'd have to follow Reichu's theory and screencaps if you want to see Seele's non-human forms. Whatever 3.0 + 1.0 reveals about Seele, this particular point was covered well prior to the movie's release. (Which makes it a total non-spoiler ) @TheDragonMask : If you think you see someone spoil something, contact the staff and DON'T draw attention it - see point 1h in the spoiler policy here . You're not in trouble because Archer spoiled nothing in that post.

[]: Re: Name suggestions for unnamed angels Post by The Dragon Mask » Tue Jul 27, 2021 2:35 am UrsusArctos wrote: .

[]: Re: Name suggestions for unnamed angels Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Jul 27, 2021 6:21 am Unless you have counter-evidence for Reichu's screencaps, your disagreement holds no weight. There's a reason why we have new rules for discussion - to prevent people from disagreeing on the basis of personal sentiments and to actually deal with the evidence presented within the show. And the evidence presented clearly shows Seele as something nonhuman (maybe not literally "ancient aliens" but very much in the same ballpark). Unless evidence to the contrary is presented, consider that confirmed and rock-solid. The Dragon Mask wrote: I thought of the possibility that posting in the thread might draw attention to it so that's why I've never said what it was/is and didn't show any text of the post I quoted. Plus I didn't want to try to involve the staff if I was mistaken or something.
summary:

As they rose not to name them, and in 2.0 there were two new angels, I rose to put my suggestions of names for these angels here, maybe I will like them. The Third Angel-Gabriel The Seventh Angel-??? And you share your suggestions.

[]: Re: Name suggestions for unnamed angels Post by Blockio » Thu May 27, 2021 6:28 pm All the a
